textByHashes.365c7b37be7883db102cd9009abe6763797e6191: I am, what of it human?
textByHashes.7890761da51d638deb9a5f27c849d3a291e0166e: I see, so now I'm meant to follow the orders of a human.
textByHashes.c5c28f41384454824cecf58a49b560815f39be23: Make no mistake human, you may have Arianwyn and the others fooled but I know what you are.
textByHashes.e3a629a7b7e922973972a5d87f2996192543013d: You're a menace. You claim you're here to help, but everywhere you go you leave a trail of bodies behind.
textByHashes.3c969d28399287e4fe80617b141bace281b7711e: Anyway, I'll come to this meeting, I'm in no place to deny Arianwyn. Just stay out of my way from here on out.
textByHashes.23b2886209735078586c916493f0506837e81d52: The other human? I think she's by the pond to the south west. Now if you'll excuse me...
textByHashes.2e4022a871b7280405c0cfbac4f746939ef5d910: No. Go away and talk to Arianwyn instead.
textByHashes.5f89c5e1f6c1aad2711d4386fa90d1d1c4f1f678: Let's not ignore the obvious, Arianwyn. Our supposed ally, , helped lead the uprising. His actions may well have endangered us all.
textByHashes.4b55035826a4fe602a58f286c01d9007193996f2: The temple was already secure. All this uprising has achieved is to anger the enemy.
textByHashes.2f3b348e03e071547e06d4c8dbae33f6cb1ec985: I care about keeping our people alive, Islwyn!
textByHashes.05298e6656643157cd364776423e06bc3b1d2ca0: Selfish? How dare you! You know nothing of the plight of the elves, girl. You'd do well to keep your mouth shut!
textByHashes.046da9d9986282048adb6df1c66d074a96276f6f: Baxtorian is gone though, even if he knew something, he can't help us now.
textByHashes.34ae40ead46d7cbc28823b7dfec879964cfbb9c4: You trust the human with this?
textByHashes.5676aec10066a3c65991c41bf54f02f598d0ee6e: You don't know? What do you mean you don't know?
textByHashes.ad650f3e2d53787cfa0b4a4871dd9966257e0263: And that's it? This gives us nothing to go on.
textByHashes.ebb9a9e0adaa93c1ce143752d08ec98f5fe84f23: But without access to the Grand Library, we have no way to be sure.
textByHashes.5b7e99b74181f687a2a72f9e4ba9ab8f388749a2: You're not suggesting we restore the city are you? Even if we could, Lord Iorwerth would instantly take it.
textByHashes.407c45189ea3e926291b9b7ececa3841fd5bdb89: You cannot be serious? Even if has proven their worth as you claim, which I have my doubts about, they'll never be deemed worthy enough to unlock Seren's hidden knowledge.
textByHashes.10d05aebb9e63b4bf7f31f9ac1b3e20facda3502: Exactly! If Seren created a way for the seals to be destroyed, she would have made it so that only an elf could break them.
textByHashes.98cdd5f709c4bcf1c8d2c341f5d31f82cf31c77f: But who was responsible? Who cursed our people?
textByHashes.361b0d6fbe21c31e75fe3d7a7208630683439941: Seren was our goddess, she would never curse us. How dare you suggest otherwise!
textByHashes.ad2ca939faa41788c18a67b7b9bdd533496c9377: Truth? You don't know the meaning of the word!
textByHashes.f912cd255683960cf18c4195b1a588dae0f9ff8a: This is a lie! It has to be! The human is showing their true colours once again!
textByHashes.7f822c9a684d919f86e155a3b7f43806baf55b80: Why are we still stood here? This human needs putting in chains!
textByHashes.9ec26a3999464e29353086c9d9ff59b331a0be81: You can start by locking this human up. They are a traitor! The curse is clearly a lie!
textByHashes.99b2fd5367fa27eb3d07b5c40f3ffdb1fa6ae132: If we were truly tied to Seren, we'd have all dropped dead when she was shattered! The curse clearly doesn't exist!
textByHashes.b8b34d97540d42408538e4108e7a4106a5f068ed: Nice of you to suddenly speak up! I'd have thought a king would command a bit of authority rather than crying in the corner!
textByHashes.b94982321261645b78b0fe6bb9e122d74420ad82: Well thank Seren for that! You only managed to lose the entire kingdom to Lord Iorwerth!
textByHashes.dc5f8e402cc770a33d7c755485f6d5ec56154dc3: I have respect! I respect the heroes who died in this war, not the coward that ran away from it!
textByHashes.abcc8e2c37351684de84baf698289c4962434cf9: I will go. I wish to see some actual proof of what this human claims.
textByHashes.ee9378d28f909b5943e22f2ed572c74a9db3cf93: The shrine at Gorlah was empty. The orb was removed quite a while ago by the looks of things.
textByHashes.a4357694d7f4ce80844cc193def08ba323cfccaf: If it helps with your overinflated ego, then yes, I now believe you.
textByHashes.d3e2b9c0e1e74e832ee35ea6ed717ba8c041ca55: Well luckily for us, I know exactly where it is. There's a cave just north of the Iorwerth Camp that is used to store supplies. Lord Iorwerth has it under close guard there.
textByHashes.380442845b4da2680e280fd21e0764b2ee98cc74: I gave myself permission. I do not serve you, Baxtorian, or anyone else here.
textByHashes.6cf665962bb76a557c6098818ae28640561b64e8: My actions benefit us all! Now that we know where the orb is, we can move to claim it.
textByHashes.e3e635b342eb1814065e26082ec9b445fd6ace4c: That's the other thing I found out. Lord Iorwerth knows we managed to enter the library. He fears the orb would not be safe behind the walls.
textByHashes.a88ab53f589880225ab93e163de2e0457a39476e: Save your suspicions for someone who cares.
textByHashes.d19830e0b88a23f4d3400dfedcbd63942b608b1c: Regardless of his intentions, Lord Iorwerth is our enemy. You should want to kill him, not reason with him.
textByHashes.05d12e006574885c1ac980a3eb8a09be54de31a4: Well look at you with your moral high ground.
textByHashes.fa6407c12eda84097d0d8861d9784e52202a13d0: Let me guess, you're going to send your favourite human.
textByHashes.a06a6bebb0f763b6e1ecf85179d77d2b3325960b: No. I have other things to do anyway.
textByHashes.67f1823cdbb711ef68ab06320238a02f29142550: You! What are you doing here?
textByHashes.491ef466aa940e3e886b49613e7d1ef3bc6183f6: Traitor? You dare call me a traitor? Your loyalties change more than the wind and you have the nerve to say I'm the traitor?
textByHashes.dc11fb730a37a7f4e87129c9fbcf75e7d1f5f2a9: Lord Iorwerth took everything from me! My whole life was destroyed by him and that dog, Essyllt! Do you really think I'd join up with them?
textByHashes.db5e6f6875c2dd91400d30292f63b0ffb21fdc4d: You fool of a human! I may not agree much with the other rebels but everything I've done has been to stop Lord Iorwerth!
textByHashes.c5e636c3ef61ad97138276cc4e10d8833212c4a1: Well now that you've ruined everything as usual, I suppose I'd better tell you.
textByHashes.1bf1397b583307ece4d4561982458dd2cce52c68: This is Iestin Edern, head of research for Lord Iorwerth, and my informant within the Iorwerth clan.
textByHashes.424707a35fcc68871cc9c5afd9f0f05527eec9f5: That's right you idiot! Iestin here has been providing me with information on the Iorwerth clan. Not only that, he is the reason why you were able to claim that Orb of Light.
textByHashes.0d54e6b285421e1ebdffe503ef5f9296a0b77332: Not to mention the fact that it kept Iestin safe from any informants that Lord Iorwerth might have among the rebels.
textByHashes.e16c2aceace7f5700d191e821167b6907cb15e20: I don't want an apology! I don't care how you feel about me. All I care about is stopping Lord Iorwerth for good. I lost all that I had, all that I cared about! I will make him pay!
textByHashes.25aeb7067eaf4e0558b13f0b684e8d302b8d4a12: No! You don't get to talk about that! You have no right!
textByHashes.e86ce8f58bca5d19e2cacb05048e58c0b56e1862: Yes. What news do you bring Iestin?
textByHashes.816dcbd6ceeb14fda24d89d4b623ecad5ed389d4: Before you interrupted, Iestin was about to give me some news. Go ahead Iestin.
textByHashes.f7f46617330bf32bf895c365b812c9a2b6adffd8: He'll know how to get in... He just needs to reclaim the orb! We need to get to Lletya now!
textByHashes.4600bab55665c0f12a189aca075ccde927894819: Your days as an informant are done. You're coming with us. Now we need to move!
textByHashes.ccff3ce4354ff0f7924be42477fbb3f98b7bae74: Dammit! Right, you two go with Elena and help the citizens. I'll find Baxtorian.
textByHashes.7cecbe8d0b5b7698521ff12556f1e97c66ff9d55: Crawl back into the hole you came from Lord Iorwerth, you won't leave here with that orb!
textByHashes.d83caff3c6dc37ea7db7511b41e748b9dfba1e38: What is this? What have you done?
textByHashes.e0d9620887cdb487f6089746c02d5233ef7941fe: And what are these apparent sacrifices you've made? Nothing compared to the suffering you've caused me, I'm sure!
textByHashes.77db9f7d53a6a1576399191276c56e55b04b9faf: I'll die before working with them.
textByHashes.3cc9ffcdbf73c39e2e7ae801f242544881fb6979: Sorry, I do not have time for idle gossip. Good day.
